AMS_score.description: Symptom score for acute mountain sickness (AMS); high values indicate worse symptoms.

Plasma_aldosterone_Low_Day1.description: Plasma aldosterone (mmol/l) measured at low altitude on Day 1. Used together with High Day 2 to compute the change in plasma aldosterone between days 1 and 2.

Plasma_aldosterone_High_Day2.description: Plasma aldosterone (mmol/l) measured at high altitude (4300 m) on Day 2. Used together with Low Day 1 to compute the change in plasma aldosterone between days 1 and 2.
